title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Rice Shower...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-umm... do you see the claw machine over
there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It looks like there are plushies of all my friends in
there. I'm a little curious...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's trying to show restraint, but she has an
obvious twinkle in her eye.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My bad luck might rub off on you... But I'll cheer
you on!
